Val cuts a single watermelon into 40 slices, and each slice has 20 black seeds and 20 white seeds.  
The total number of seeds in each slice is 20 black + 20 white = 40 seeds.  
Each slice has 40 seeds, and there are 40 slices.  
The total number of seeds in the watermelon is 40 slices × 40 seeds = 1600 seeds.  
The total number of seeds in the watermelon is 1600.
